task_completion.description: Navigate to the Password Management page in SuiteCRM
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser displays the SuiteCRM 'Password Management' settings page.

task_completion.description: Set the minimum password length to 12
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Minimum Length' input field on the Password Management page is filled with the number '12'.

task_completion.description: Enable the requirement for at least one uppercase letter
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkbox for 'One Upper Case Letter' (or equivalent uppercase requirement) is checked.

task_completion.description: Enable the requirement for at least one lowercase letter
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkbox for 'One Lower Case Letter' (or equivalent lowercase requirement) is checked.

task_completion.description: Enable the requirement for at least one number
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkbox for 'One Number' (or equivalent number requirement) is checked.

task_completion.description: Enable the requirement for at least one special character
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkbox for 'One Special Character' (or equivalent special character requirement) is checked.

task_completion.description: Save the updated password management settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: Evidence of saving the configuration, such as clicking a 'Save' button on the Password Management page, or a confirmation message indicating settings were saved.

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to configure settings
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacted with the SuiteCRM web interface in a browser, not via terminal commands, API scripts, or database queries.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual SuiteCRM application
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent modified the settings within the SuiteCRM application, rather than writing the requirements in a text editor or note-taking app.

integrity.description: Settings were modified through genuine UI interaction
integrity.visual_evidence: The changes appear to be made through normal user interaction with the form elements, without evidence of modifying the page source via browser developer tools.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target password complexity requires: minimum length of 12, and checkboxes enabled for uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and special characters.
